name: Cash Time
description_short: Cash Time offers title loans, personal loans, and registration loans with same-day funding at their Mesa, AZ location, serving the East Valley region.
description_long:
Cash Time Loan Center operates a physical lending storefront in Mesa, Arizona, located at 1133 W. Broadway Rd near Alma School Road. The company serves residents of Mesa, Chandler, Scottsdale, and Tempe with fast cash lending solutions positioned as emergency financial assistance. Their Mesa location is conveniently situated near Mesa Community College and the Mesa Arts Center, with extended hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays, 10 AM–4 PM Saturday).

Cash Time's primary service offerings include title loans, personal loans, and registration loans. They advertise low interest rates, no hidden fees, and flexible payment plans designed to fit individual budgets. The company specializes in title loan buyouts, positioning this as a way to help customers escape higher-cost loans from competing lenders and reduce overall interest expenses. All loans include transparent terms and no prepayment penalties, allowing early payoff without additional charges.

The company emphasizes speed and accessibility as key differentiators. Customers can apply online through their website (cashtime.com) or visit the physical Mesa location to meet with a loan specialist. They claim most customers receive instant approval and same-day funding with the option for direct bank deposit. An online portal provides 24/7 access to loan balances and payment options for account management.

Cash Time operates as a storefront lender offering collateral-based and unsecured consumer loans in the emergency-cash category. While the website presents competitive claims around interest rates and buyout options, the company operates in the high-cost lending space characteristic of title loans and registration loans, which typically carry significantly higher APRs than traditional personal loans or bank products. Borrowers should carefully evaluate whether title loan collateral requirements and associated costs fit their financial situation.
pros: Same-day funding available with instant approval for qualified applicants
Title loan buyout service explicitly offered to help customers refinance expensive existing loans
No prepayment penalties, allowing early payoff without additional fees
Multiple application channels: online (cashtime.com) or in-person at Mesa location
24/7 online portal access to view loan balance and payment options
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–6 PM) and Saturday availability (10 AM–4 PM)
Clear, transparent loan terms with stated absence of hidden fees
Flexible payment plans claimed to be designed to fit customer budgets
cons: Title loans and registration loans are inherently high-cost products with APRs typically 100%+ annually
Collateral requirement for title loans creates risk of vehicle repossession on default
No specific APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on website, preventing transparent rate comparison
Operates as a storefront lender, not a bank or credit union, limiting regulatory protections
Registration loans are often considered predatory products in many states due to high costs
best_for: Borrowers with a vehicle who need emergency cash and can qualify for title loans
Customers seeking to refinance existing high-cost loans from other lenders via buyout
East Valley residents (Mesa, Chandler, Scottsdale, Tempe area) needing fast same-day funding
Individuals without access to traditional bank personal loans who can provide collateral
diagnosis: Cash Time is best suited for borrowers in the East Valley who need emergency cash quickly and own a vehicle they can use as collateral. The critical caveat is that title loans and registration loans are high-cost financial products with APRs typically exceeding 100% annually; borrowers should exhaust traditional lending options first and understand the vehicle repossession risk before proceeding.
services: Title loans with collateral based on vehicle ownership
Personal loans (unsecured, amount range not specified on website)
Registration loans using vehicle registration as collateral
Title loan buyouts to refinance loans from competing lenders
In-person application and consultation at Mesa location
Same-day funding with direct bank deposit options
Online account portal for 24/7 balance and payment management
Loan refinancing to reduce monthly payments
